series_metadata.series_title: Individual with Disabilities Education Act (“IDEA”) County Records
series_metadata.series_description: County technical assistance and training plans for the implementation of IDEA, letters and memos regarding the issuance of a finding, corrective action plan, and performance improvement plan for noncompliance with requirements of IDEA.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
